title: Youth serenade Gary Player
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS AND VIDEO - A youth...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video","html":"Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS AND VIDEO - A youth ensemble from Oaknote Music school thrilled the audience last night at the Nomads Golf Club event, to honour SA golfing legend Gary Player.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS AND VIDEO - A youth ensemble from Oaknote Music school thrilled the audience last night at the Nomads Golf Club event, to honour SA golfing legend Gary Player."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The event took place at the Goose Valley Golf Club yesterday, Tuesday 18 November, and Player was visibly moved by the accolades and attention showed to him as he received his Nomad tie celebrating 65 years as a member."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The ensemble played a piece called Doctor conducted by Oaknote music teacher Marie Skeen. The Russian Sailor Dance performed by Luc le Roux and Eben Oberholzer stole the show.","html":"The ensemble played a piece called Doctor conducted by Oaknote music teacher Marie Skeen. The Russian Sailor Dance performed by Luc le Roux and Eben Oberholzer stole the show."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"ALSO READ: Nomads honour Gary Player","html":"ALSO READ: Nomads honour Gary Player"},{"type":"heading","text":"VIDEO: Watch them in performance below:","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
